---
name: Feature request
about: New template, new agent support, or new idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's the use case?**
What problem are you trying to solve?

**What agent / tool / framework would this support?**
e.g. "Zed editor uses `.zed/settings.json`" or "Ruby on Rails projects aren't detected"

**Proposed solution**
If you have a specific idea, describe it. If not, just describe the problem.

**Would you open a PR for this?**
- [ ] Yes, I can implement it
- [ ] No, just requesting it
